disabledTooltip.modifyHeadersRuleActionType: Change the rule action type to Modify Headers to add this action.
disabledTooltip.regexFilterBlockedByUrlFilter: Delete the existing URL filter first. Only one of URL filter or regex filter can be used.
disabledTooltip.redirectRuleActionType: Change the rule action type to Redirect to add this action.
disabledTooltip.redirectUrlExists: Delete the existing redirect URL before adding another one.
disabledTooltip.conditionAlreadyAdded: This type of condition has already been added and cannot be added again.
disabledTooltip.urlFilterBlockedByRegexFilter: Delete the existing regex filter first. Only one of URL filter or regex filter can be used.

cookieSyncRequestHeader.description: Sync cookies for a specific website to the request header. New permissions need to be granted.
cookieSyncRequestHeader.title: Cookie Sync to Request Header

domainType.description: Specifies whether the network request is first-party or third-party to the domain from which it originated.
domainType.title: Domain Type

excludedInitiatorDomains.description: The rule will not match network requests originating from the list of excluded initiator domains. If the list is empty or omitted, no domains are excluded. This takes precedence over initiator domains.
excludedInitiatorDomains.title: Excluded Initiator Domains

excludedTopDomains.description: The rule will not match requests whose associated top-level frame domain matches one from the list of excluded top domains. If omitted, no top-level frame domains are excluded.
excludedTopDomains.title: Excluded Top Domains

excludedRequestDomains.description: The rule will not match network requests when the domains matches one from the list of excludedRequestDomains. If the list is empty or omitted, no domains are excluded. This takes precedence over requestDomains.
excludedRequestDomains.title: Excluded Request Domains

excludedRequestMethods.description: List of request methods which the rule won't match. Only one of requestMethods and excludedRequestMethods should be specified. If neither is specified, all request methods are matched.
excludedRequestMethods.title: Excluded Request Methods

excludedResourceTypes.description: List of resource types which the rule won't match. Only one of resourceTypes and excludedResourceTypes should be specified. If neither is specified, all resource types except main_frame are blocked.
excludedResourceTypes.title: Excluded Resource Types

initiatorDomains.description: The rule will only match network requests originating from the list of initiator domains. If the list is omitted, the rule is applied to requests from all domains. An empty list is not allowed.
initiatorDomains.title: Initiator Domains

modifyRequestHeader.description: Set, remove, or append HTTP request headers.
modifyRequestHeader.title: Modify HTTP Request Header

modifyResponseHeader.description: Set, remove, or append HTTP response headers.
modifyResponseHeader.title: Modify HTTP Response Header

regexFilter.description: The rule will only match network requests whose URL contains any of the specified substrings. If the list is omitted, the rule is applied to requests with all URLs. An empty list is not allowed. Only one of urlFilter or regexFilter can be specified.
regexFilter.title: Regex Filter

requestDomains.description: The rule will only match network requests when the domain matches one from the list of requestDomains. If the list is omitted, the rule is applied to requests from all domains. An empty list is not allowed.
requestDomains.title: Request Domains

topDomains.description: The rule will only match requests whose associated top-level frame domain matches one from the list of top domains. If omitted, all top-level frame domains are accepted.
topDomains.title: Top Domains

requestMethods.description: List of HTTP request methods which the rule can match. An empty list is not allowed. Note: Specifying requestMethods will also exclude non-HTTP(s) requests.
requestMethods.title: Request Methods

resourceTypes.description: List of resource types which the rule can match. An empty list is not allowed.
resourceTypes.title: Resource Types

simpleRedirectUrl.description: Redirect matched requests to a specific URL.
simpleRedirectUrl.title: Simple Redirect URL

urlFilter.description: The rule will only match network requests whose URL contains any of the specified substrings. If the list is omitted, the rule is applied to requests with all URLs. An empty list is not allowed. Only one of urlFilter or regexFilter can be specified.
urlFilter.title: URL Filter

urlRegexFilterCaseSensitive.description: Specifies whether the URL filter is case sensitive.
urlRegexFilterCaseSensitive.title: Url & Regex Filter Case Sensitive

commentsDialog.description: Add or edit comments for this profile field.
commentsDialog.title: Edit Comments

domains.asciiOnly: The entries must consist of only ascii characters.

excludedInitiatorDomains.description: The rule will not match network requests originating from the list of excludedInitiatorDomains. If the list is empty or omitted, no domains are excluded. This takes precedence over initiatorDomains.
excludedInitiatorDomains.title: Excluded Initiator Domains Filter

excludedRequestDomains.description: The rule will not match network requests when the domains matches one from the list of excludedRequestDomains. If the list is empty or omitted, no domains are excluded. This takes precedence over requestDomains.
excludedRequestDomains.title: Excluded Request Domains Filter

excludedTopDomains.description: The rule will not match network requests when the associated top-level frame's domain matches one from the list of excludedTopDomains. If the list is empty or omitted, no domains are excluded. This takes precedence over topDomains.
excludedTopDomains.title: Excluded Top Domains Filter

initiatorDomains.description: The rule will only match network requests originating from the list of initiatorDomains. If the list is omitted, the rule is applied to requests from all domains. An empty list is not allowed.
initiatorDomains.title: Initiator Domains Filter

domains.matchesInitiator: This matches against the request initiator and not the request url.
domains.punycode: Use punycode encoding for internationalized domains.

requestDomains.description: The rule will only match network requests when the domain matches one from the list of requestDomains. If the list is omitted, the rule is applied to requests from all domains. An empty list is not allowed.
requestDomains.title: Request Domains Filter

domains.serviceWorkerFallback: For requests without an associated top-level frame, the request initiator's domain is used instead.
domains.subdomainsExcluded: Sub-domains of the listed domains are also excluded.
domains.subdomainsMatched: Sub-domains of the listed domains are also matched.

topDomains.description: The rule will only match network requests when the associated top-level frame's domain matches one from the list of topDomains. If the list is omitted, the rule is applied to requests associated with all top-level frame domains. An empty list is not allowed.
topDomains.title: Top Domains Filter

domains.useCurrentTabDomain: Use the domain of the current tab

regexFilter.description: Regular expression to match against the network request url.
regexFilter.title: Regex Filter

urlFilter.anchor: - Anchor: marks start or end of the URL.
urlFilter.domainAnchor: - Domain anchor: matches start of a (sub)domain.
urlFilter.omitted: Omitted = all URLs match. Empty string not allowed.
urlFilter.onlyOne: Note: Only one of urlFilter or regexFilter can be used.
urlFilter.separator: {separator} - Separator: matches anything except letters, digits, {chars}, or end of URL.
urlFilter.title: URL Filter
urlFilter.useCurrentTabRootUrl: Use the root URL of the current tab

share.sensitiveWarning: Shared profiles may include sensitive authentication tokens or cookies.
share.title: Share Profiles

toast.cookiesPermissionRequired: Import cancelled: cookies permission is required for cookie sync profiles
toast.invalidShareLinkDescription: Check that the share link is complete and does not include extra characters.

actions.unnamedGroupLabel: "{profileName}" | "{profileName} and {remainingCount} other profile" | "{profileName} and {remainingCount} other profiles"

alert.globalRuleDescription: Add a condition to avoid issues.
alert.globalRuleTitle: This profile affects every request and might break sites.
alert.registrationErrorTitle: This profile caused an error when registering rules.

changeType.description: Select a new action type for this profile. Switching types may remove existing actions.
changeType.title: Change Rule Action Type

profile.empty: No data, please add any actions or conditions first.

header.addActionOrConditionTooltip: Add a new action or condition

priority.description: Priority defines the conflict resolution strategy for rules. When multiple rules match a single request, the system executes the rule with the higher weight as a priority.
priority.title: Edit Rule Priority

sidebar.quickCreateDescription: The default rule action type can be changed in the submenu of New profile

actions.pauseAndRememberDescription: Pause the group and remember its enabled profiles. Only those profiles will be enabled when the group is resumed. Changing a profile's status elsewhere clears this memory.
actions.resumeRememberedDescription: Resume the profiles remembered when the group was paused. Checkbox groups restore every remembered profile; radio groups restore the first remembered profile. Changing a profile's status elsewhere clears this memory.

redirectUrl.description: The redirect URL. Redirects to JavaScript URLs are not allowed.
redirectUrl.title: Redirect URL
redirectUrl.useCurrentTabUrl: Use the URL of the current tab

description.allow: Allow the network request. The request won't be intercepted if there is an allow rule which matches it
description.allowAllRequests: Allow all requests within a frame hierarchy, including the frame request itself
description.modifyHeaders: Modify request/response headers from the network request
description.upgradeScheme: Upgrade the network request URL's scheme to HTTPS if the request is HTTP or FTP

descriptions.nativeResourceTypeBehavior: Resource type defaults to 'all', but enabling this option will not set it to 'all', and rules without a resource type condition will match only a narrower range of requests.
descriptions.showCommentsInline: Show each field's comments next to its other actions instead of in the More Actions menu.

fields.nativeResourceTypeBehavior: Use native DNR resource type behavior

reset.description: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to their default values?
reset.title: Reset extension settings

troubleshooting.reinitializeDescription: If you find that the number of active profiles you defined is inconsistent with the number displayed in the extension popup badge, please click the button below.
troubleshooting.reinitializeError: Failed to reinitialize profiles. Please report this issue to us.
troubleshooting.reinitializeSuccess: All profiles have been reinitialized. Please check if the issue is resolved. If not, please report this issue to us.

syncCookie.refreshTooltip: Refresh to get the latest cookie
syncCookie.sharingWarning: Warning: Sharing cookies with others may result in the leakage of login credentials!
syncCookie.title: Sync Cookies

toast.notFound: The cookie was not found. It may no longer exist.
